help.title: How to file an insurance claim?
help.detail: For any claim always contact the 24/7 assistance service in Czech at +420 234 240 244.
help.bulletsHeadline: The insurance does not cover the following situations:

richBullets.title: The consequences of alcohol consumption or the use of addictive substances or products containing addictive substances by the insured person.
Continuation or recurrence of an illness the insured person had before traveling abroad, except in cases of acute flare-ups of a stabilized chronic condition.

Complications from infertility treatment, complications from voluntary termination of pregnancy, complications from pregnancy after the 24th week, complications from high-risk pregnancy, or complications from childbirth.
Infection with sexually transmitted infections, HIV, AIDS, or hepatitis B and C.

help.footer: A complete list and the wording of exclusions can be found in Article 12 of the General Section and in the Special Section of the General Terms and Conditions for Travel Insurance No. 1/2017 for individual insurance policies.

party.title: Who will be traveling?
party.familyDescription: The account holder, their partner and children under 18, even when they travel without you.

help.title: Who will be traveling?
help.detail:
Travel insurance can be arranged for you and the whole family.

Family package covers:

1.Your spouse, registered partner, or domestic partner living with you in the same household, as long as they have permanent residence in the same country as you and do not have permanent residence at the travel destination.\n\n2.All your children, including those from previous relationships, up to 18 years old (there is no limit on the number of children)..\n\n Each insured person has individual coverage limits within the "Me and My Family" package, and your family members are covered only when they travel with you.

party.longTermFamilyDescription: Account holder with partner, children and grandchildren up to 21. They can travel independently.

where.title: Where are you traveling to?
where.footer: The Europe option covers the whole territory… show more.

help.title: Europe or the world?
help.detail: Short-term travel insurance The Europe variant covers the entire territory of continental Europe including adjacent islands and the territory: ・Armenia ・Azerbaijan ・Egypt ・Kazakhstan ・Cyprus ・Morocco ・Georgia ・Tunisia ・Turkey The insurance is not valid in the territory of the Russian Federation, Belarus, Sevastopol, Donetsk, Kherson, Luhansk and Zaporozhye regions. The World variant is valid worldwide outside the territory of the Russian Federation, Belarus, Sevastopol, Donetsk, Kherson, Luhansk and Zaporozhye regions, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Cuba, Venezuela, Myanmar, Crimea and Afghanistan. Long-term travel insurance The Europe variant covers the entire territory of continental Europe including adjacent islands, the European part of Russia ( delimited by the Ural mountain range) and further to the territory of Egypt, Morocco, Tunisia and Turkey. The territorial validity is not limited in the World variant.

shortTermHelp.title: Europe or worldwide?
shortTermHelp.detail: The Europe option covers all of continental Europe, including nearby islands and the following territories: ・Armenia ・Azerbaijan ・Egypt ・Kazakhstan ・Cyprus ・Morocco ・Georgia ・Tunisia ・Turkey Cover does not apply in Russia, Belarus, Sevastopol, or the Donetsk, Kherson, Luhansk and Zaporizhzhia regions. The Worldwide option covers the rest of the world, except Russia, Belarus, Sevastopol, the Donetsk, Kherson, Luhansk and Zaporizhzhia regions, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Cuba, Venezuela, Myanmar, Crimea and Afghanistan.

term.title: How long would you like to be covered?
term.footer: Long-term insurance is arranged for an indefinite period and is valid from midnight of the day following the date of the agreement

help.title: For how long do you wish to be insured?
help.detail:
Short-term coverage can be arranged within an hour of completing the insurance agreement in Smart Banka for your desired length of stay.

If you travel abroad regularly, a Long-term travel insurance with a low monthly payment might be more beneficial for you.\nIn this case, remember that the total duration of a continuous stay abroad cannot exceed 90 days, and the insurance cannot be arranged while you are abroad.The insurance is set up for an indefinite period and becomes effective at midnight the day after the agreement is finalized.

shortTerm.title: Who will you travel with?
shortTerm.detail:
You can take out travel insurance for yourself or your whole family.

With the I’m travelling with my family package, the following people are covered:
1. Your spouse, registered partner, or another person living in the same household as you, provided they are permanently resident in the same country as you and not permanently resident at the travel destination.
2. All your children together, including children from previous relationships, up to age 18. There is no limit on the number of children.

Limits under the I’m travelling with my family package apply separately to each insured person, and your family members are covered only when travelling with you.

longTerm.title: Who will be travelling?
longTerm.detail: You can take out travel insurance for yourself or your whole family. The Me and my family package covers you, your partner and your children up to age 21. The limits apply separately to each insured person, and family members are covered even when travelling on their own.

term.title: How long do you want to be insured for?

shortTerm.title: Short-term
benefits: For trips in Europe or worldwide
Medical expenses up to CZK 15 million
Liability cover up to CZK 5 million

longTerm.title: Long-term
longTerm.description: Ongoing cover. Each trip up to 120 days.

benefits.moreInfoText: Includes ski trips in the Czech Republic. More info

benefits.text: Medical expenses up to CZK 25 million
Liability insurance up to CZK 5 million

moreInfo.title: Worldwide travel, including trip cancellation in the Czech Republic
moreInfo.detail: Travel insurance is valid worldwide, except for Russia, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Venezuela, Belarus, Myanmar, Crimea, Afghanistan, Sevastopol, and the Donetsk, Kherson, Luhansk, and Zaporizhzhia regions. Before planning a trip abroad, we recommend checking whether the Ministry of Foreign Affairs has issued a travel warning, advice against travel, or advice to travel only when necessary. In these cases, your insurance may not cover you, as an exclusion may apply. Trip cancellation insurance in the Czech Republic For cancelled travel, unused services, or missed transport, cover applies within the Czech Republic for trips longer than 2 nights.

helpSheet.title: More about insurance
helpSheet.detail: Short-term cover starts just 1 hour after you take out the policy in Smart Bank and lasts for the period you choose. Full information about short-term travel insurance If you travel abroad regularly, Long-term travel insurance with low monthly payments may be a better choice. It also starts 1 hour after you take out the policy. Full information about long-term travel insurance

victoryCreditCard.title:
Done, you are now insured.
Consider having a credit card that might come in handy abroad.
victoryCreditCard.detail: Some hotels or car rental services only accept credit cards - it might be the only way to make a reservation. And it might come in handy in case of unexpected expenses.
